product_overview: ErpGreeHouse is a Telegram-integrated CRM and loyalty management platform with an Admin UI for product, customer and analytics management. It provides JWT-based authentication, ERPNext integration (mockable), and a REST API for admin operations and POS/marketing workflows.
core_goals: Provide a secure JWT-based admin authentication and session lifecycle (login, refresh, logout).
Enable CRUD operations for customers and products via the Admin UI and API.
Expose analytics, reporting and export capabilities for business insights.
Support loyalty program operations (customer profiles and QR token generation) and integrate with ERPNext.
Allow marketing campaign management and consent handling.
Support POS integration for creating sales and retrieving receipts.
Ensure the system can be run in Docker for development, testing and E2E automation.

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: JWT-based authentication for admin users with token refresh support used by the Admin UI and API clients.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access and refresh tokens (or cookies)
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with valid refresh token (Authorization: Bearer <refresh> or cookie) -> Receive 200 TokenResponse with new access token
POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 InvalidCredentials
POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with expired/invalid refresh token -> Receive 401 InvalidToken

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard view that surfaces widgets and analytics data to admin users.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> GET /api/v1/dashboard/widgets with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 WidgetConfig[] -> GET /api/v1/dashboard/analytics with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 AnalyticsData
GET /api/v1/dashboard/analytics without Authorization header or with invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Create, list and update customer accounts used across CRM, loyalty and marketing features.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> POST /api/v1/customers with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {full_name, phone, notes} -> Receive 200 Customer -> GET /api/v1/customers with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 Customer[]
POST /api/v1/customers with Authorization: Bearer <access> and missing required fields -> Receive 400 ValidationError
PUT /api/v1/customers/{id} with Authorization: Bearer <access> for non-existent id -> Receive 404 NotFound

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Manage product catalog and inventory entries through API endpoints used by the Admin UI and POS.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> POST /api/v1/products with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {name, price, description} -> Receive 200 Product -> GET /api/v1/products with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 Product[]
POST /api/v1/products with Authorization: Bearer <access> and invalid price (non-number or negative) -> Receive 400 ValidationError

features.name: Analytics & Reporting
features.description: Business analytics endpoints and export functionality for summaries and downloadable reports.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> GET /api/v1/analytics/summary with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 AnalyticsSummary -> GET /api/v1/analytics/export with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 FileDownload (report)

GET /api/v1/analytics/export with Authorization: Bearer <access> for a very large export or when server-side export fails -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error (or timeout/failure) due to limited export error handling

features.name: Loyalty System
features.description: Customer loyalty profiles and QR-token generation to support point accrual and redemption workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> POST /api/v1/loyalty/qr-token with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {customer_id} -> Receive 200 QRTokenResponse -> GET /api/v1/loyalty/profile/{customer_id} with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 LoyaltyProfile
POST /api/v1/loyalty/qr-token with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {customer_id} referencing non-existent customer -> Receive 404 NotFound

features.name: Marketing Integration
features.description: Manage marketing campaigns, segments and customer consent for communications.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> GET /api/v1/marketing/campaigns with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 Campaign[] -> POST /api/v1/marketing/consent with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {customer_id, consent_given:true} -> Receive 200 ConsentResponse
POST /api/v1/marketing/consent with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {customer_id} referencing unknown customer -> Receive 404 NotFound

features.name: POS Integration
features.description: Create sales and retrieve receipts; used by POS systems to record transactions and integrate with loyalty and product catalog.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/public/auth/login with body {username, password} -> Receive 200 LoginResponse with access token -> POST /api/v1/pos/sale with Authorization: Bearer <access> and body {customer_id, items:[{product_id, quantity, price}], total} -> Receive 200 SaleResponse -> GET /api/v1/pos/receipts with Authorization: Bearer <access> -> Receive 200 Receipt[]
POST /api/v1/pos/sale with Authorization: Bearer <access> and invalid items schema or validation error -> Receive 400 ValidationError

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard with widgets and analytics

features.name: Loyalty System
features.description: Customer loyalty program with QR codes

known_limitations.impact: Cannot run tests locally without Docker

known_limitations.issue: Limited error handling in analytics export
known_limitations.impact: Large exports may timeout or fail silently

known_limitations.issue: QR token generation depends on customer ID sequence
known_limitations.impact: Potential token collisions in high-concurrency scenarios

known_limitations.issue: No input validation on some API endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Invalid data may be accepted without proper validation

known_limitations.issue: Frontend locale handling is hardcoded to English for E2E
